meta_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve Tutorial Hell (Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop watching tutorials and start shipping. Use this advanced Git with AI checklist featuring Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your SaaS MVP.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start committing. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you transform your Git history into a strategic asset. Focus on feature-gated development, automated commit documentation, and rapid validation to move from prototype to production-ready SaaS.
content.intro:
The screen glows with the fifth 'To-Do List' tutorial of the week, but your production database remains empty. You are trapped in the high-fidelity illusion of progress, mistaking tutorial consumption for actual business growth. The market doesn't pay for your knowledge of React hooks; it pays for solved problems and working software.

True engineering velocity comes from bridging the gap between intent and implementation. By leveraging AI-augmented Git workflows, you stop being a student and start being a founder. We are moving beyond simple code generation into an automated, iterative loop that treats your repository as a living, revenue-generating engine.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Define your SaaS domain model and business logic constraints before writing a single line of application code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core business requirements for a [Project Type] SaaS. Generate a modular directory structure, a robust database schema using Prisma, and a set of feature-flag definitions optimized for rapid A/B testing.

steps.title: Context-Aware Iteration
steps.description: Feed your specific business requirements into Claude Code to ensure the AI understands your proprietary logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current repository context. Identify potential bottlenecks in the authentication flow and suggest an optimized path for user onboarding that minimizes friction to the first 'aha' moment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review files in /src/auth and suggest improvements for onboarding conversion'

steps.title: Automated Commit Documentation
steps.description: Maintain a high-integrity Git history by using AI to generate semantic commit messages that explain the 'why' behind the 'what'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the recent changes in the repository. Generate a conventional commit message that highlights the business value of these changes for the stakeholders.

steps.title: Rapid Feature Validation
steps.description: Deploy features behind flags and use Claude Code to run automated integration tests to ensure your MVP stays functional.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of integration tests for the new payment gateway integration, ensuring that edge cases like failed transactions are handled gracefully and logged.

steps.title: Refactoring for Scalability
steps.description: Use AI to identify technical debt created during the MVP phase and systematically refactor code for performance and maintainability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify code smells in the current codebase that could impede scaling to 10k users. Propose a refactoring plan that prioritizes database query efficiency and API response times.

pro_tips: Treat your Git commit history as a product roadmap; if a feature isn't in Git, it doesn't exist to your investors.
Use Claude Code to automate the generation of your changelog directly from your commit history to keep stakeholders informed.
Always define your business constraints in a 'SYSTEM.md' file at the root of your repo so the AI maintains alignment.
Implement 'AI-driven code reviews' by piping your PR diffs into Claude Code before human review to catch logic errors early.
Limit your AI sessions to single, well-defined features to prevent context drift and hallucination in your codebase.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, deploy to a staging environment and begin the customer feedback loop immediately.
content.conversion_block: Stop chasing tutorials and start shipping the product your users are waiting for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
